path.description: The path to create the component.

isIdIncluded.description: Whether or not the component seclector gets added

isParamsChild.description: determines wheter the component is present or container if its container it will get a params class as well as a @Input params

isPropsChild.description: determines wheter the component is present or container if its container it will get a params class as well as a @Input params

standalone.description: Whether the generated component is standalone.

routing.description: (experimental) Create a routing module. or if standalone create routing

routeKey.description: The route that gets added to the innerNav.urls object in the environment.dev.ts file

route.description: The route path for a lazy-loaded module. When supplied, creates a component in the new module, and adds the route to that component in the `Routes` array declared in the module provided in the `--module` option.
